action_choice_hints: The candidate cell is in the same row as a cell with a moving token.
The candidate cell is the nearest unblocked cell in a given direction from a moving token.
There exists a contiguous segment of empty cells between the candidate cell and a static obstacle.
The candidate cell is within K steps of a boundary in a given direction.
The candidate cell is the first cell after a drawn trace along a column.
The candidate cell is not blocked by any obstacle when moving from a moving token along a straight line.
There exists a drawn trace in the same column as the candidate cell.
The candidate cell is adjacent to a region containing a static obstacle.
The candidate cell is in the bottom band of the grid.
The candidate cell is the only available cell in its row not blocked by an obstacle.
The candidate cell is the first empty cell encountered when scanning from the top of its column.
There exists a moving token in the same column as the candidate cell.
The candidate cell is not part of a contiguous run of obstacles.
The candidate cell is within a region bounded by static obstacles on both sides.
The candidate cell is the only cell in its column that is not adjacent to a drawn trace.
The candidate cell is the nearest cell to a moving token that is not blocked by a static obstacle.
transition_hints: When a moving token is selected, it advances to the next unblocked cell in a specified direction.
Selecting a cell with a moving token causes a drawn trace to appear along the path traversed.
If a moving token encounters a static obstacle, it stops before the obstacle.
Selecting an empty cell does not change the state unless it is in the path of a moving token.
Drawn traces remain static after being created and do not move.
Static obstacles do not change state regardless of actions.
Moving tokens only move along unblocked, contiguous empty cells.
If a moving token reaches the boundary, it stops at the last available cell.
Selecting a cell not aligned with a moving token does not trigger any movement.
Drawn traces are only created along the path of a moving token's movement.
Multiple moving tokens act independently; only the selected one moves.
Cells with static obstacles block the movement of moving tokens.

diversity_requirements: Include templates that reference both row and column relations.
Ensure at least one template uses nearest/first-encountered logic along a direction.
placeholder_usage_limits: Limit templates with more than two placeholders to at most 10.
Restrict templates that use global grid properties to no more than 5.
avoidances: Avoid templates that only check for the presence of a single token type in a cell.
Avoid templates that rely solely on absolute coordinates or grid positions.
